_provenance.title: Iloilo City barangays most exposed to 100-year flood hazard
_provenance.derivation: Barangay polygons (brgy_geography.csv, WKT->GeoJSON, coords rounded to 6 dp) joined on adm4_pcode with Project NOAH flood-hazard area shares (project_noah_hazards.csv); the 25 of 180 barangays with the highest pct_area_flood_hazard_100yr_high + pct_area_flood_hazard_100yr_med (cutoff >= 37.22%) are included to keep the file under 100 KB.
_provenance.semantics: Features are BARANGAY ADMINISTRATIVE POLYGONS attributed with the share of barangay area under each Project NOAH 100-year flood-hazard level -- NOT hydraulic flood extents. flood_100yr_*_pct is percent of barangay area; severity is 'high' when the high-hazard share >= the medium-hazard share.
_provenance.source: Project CCHAIN (Iloilo City subset, repo data/processed/cchain_iloilo/), tables brgy_geography + project_noah_hazards + location
_provenance.upstream: Project NOAH hazard maps via Project CCHAIN, HDX https://data.humdata.org/dataset/project-cchain (open license; attribute Project CCHAIN)
_provenance.vintage: CCHAIN 2003-2022 release; NOAH hazard layer static (freq=S)
_provenance.regenerate: see public/layers/README.md (derivation documented step by step)
